headline: OVERSIGHT YOU CAN DEFEND
subheading: Structure genuine QP control over your CMO under EU GMP Chapter 7 and Annex 16.
flux_prompt: An abstract editorial conceptual composition evoking a Qualified Person's oversight of outsourced pharmaceutical manufacturing. A central deep navy node radiates a glowing teal and cyan network of fine connecting lines outward to several smaller satellite hubs, symbolising one certifying authority maintaining control across a distributed contract-manufacturing supply chain. The connecting threads pass through translucent layered glass panels and protective shield-like geometric forms, suggesting governance, accountability and a chain of custody that cannot be broken. A precise checkmark-like seal of authority glows in subtle fresh green at the central node, the single warm accent against cool clinical tones. Faint ghosted outlines of sterile manufacturing vessels, sealed vials and a contractual document grid float in soft shallow-depth-of-field bokeh in the background, brushed stainless-steel textures catching cool rim light. Premium clinical-luxury atmosphere, deep navy gradient background, polished reflective surfaces, sense of precision, traceability and quiet authority. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
